# fhhs-skills pi subagent adapters

These wrappers let pi subagent tooling load the existing fhhs agent personas from `agents/*.md`.
Use `agentScope: "project"` or `"both"` so `.pi/agents/*.md` can be discovered in your repo root.

| subagent_type | Source agent | Default model profile | Source file |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fh:code-architect` | `code-architect` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex:high` | `agents/code-architect.md` |
| `fh:code-explorer` | `code-explorer` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini:medium` | `agents/code-explorer.md` |
| `fh:code-reviewer` | `code-reviewer` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex:high` | `agents/code-reviewer.md` |
| `fh:design-adapt` | `design-adapt` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini:medium` | `agents/design-adapt.md` |

| `fh:gsd-codebase-mapper` | `gsd-codebase-mapper` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini:medium` | `agents/gsd-codebase-mapper.md` |
| `fh:gsd-debugger` | `gsd-debugger` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex:high` | `agents/gsd-debugger.md` |

| `fh:gsd-research-synthesizer` | `gsd-research-synthesizer` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex:high` | `agents/gsd-research-synthesizer.md` |

| `worker` | `worker` | `openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex:high` | (generated compatibility alias) |

High-quality plan/build/review agents default to `openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex:high`.
Faster execution-oriented agents default to `openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini:medium`.
The generated `worker` alias is pinned to the strong Codex profile for translated `general-purpose` dispatches.

Need a different profile? Use `/agents` (edit), or `subagents.agentOverrides` in `.pi/settings.json` / `~/.pi/agent/settings.json`.
